text_raw: Blimey.. Look at that mountain over there!
text_clean: Blimey.. Look at that mountain over there!

text_raw: I'm not seeing things, am I?
text_clean: I'm not seeing things, am I?

text_raw: I've never seen lightning so terrifying in my whole life.
text_clean: I've never seen lightning so terrifying in my whole life.

text_raw: No matter how rare, herbs aren't worth dying for.
text_clean: No matter how rare, herbs aren't worth dying for.

text_raw: One mustn't overlook the ancestors' wrath.
text_clean: One mustn't overlook the ancestors' wrath.

text_raw: Have you not heard the tale about that mountain?
text_clean: Have you not heard the tale about that mountain?

text_raw: We ought to leave before we get ourselves hurt.
text_clean: We ought to leave before we get ourselves hurt.

text_raw: Don't tell me you're afraid?
text_clean: Don't tell me you're afraid?

text_raw: This is the perfect chance to get our hands on the rarest of herbs!
text_clean: This is the perfect chance to get our hands on the rarest of herbs!

text_raw: Alright then, fine!
text_clean: Alright then, fine!

text_raw: What a shame...
text_clean: What a shame...

text_raw: Lightning-struck herbs would fetch me a pretty sum...
text_clean: Lightning-struck herbs would fetch me a pretty sum...

text_raw: Lightning can drive away the darkness
text_clean: Lightning can drive away the darkness

text_raw: that looms over Silver Wolf Mountain...
text_clean: that looms over Silver Wolf Mountain...

text_raw: Hmm... But.
text_clean: Hmm... But.

text_raw: Oh mighty Dangsan...
text_clean: Oh mighty Dangsan...

text_raw: All paths lead to a single destination...
text_clean: All paths lead to a single destination...

text_raw: You're back already.
text_clean: You're back already.

text_raw: How did it compare to your expectations?
text_clean: How did it compare to your expectations?

text_raw: Well it couldn't have been easy, but...
text_clean: Well it couldn't have been easy, but...

text_raw: Certainly not impossible... for a Baikan.
text_clean: Certainly not impossible... for a Baikan.

text_raw: Show me what you found, I will allow you to use it.
text_clean: Show me what you found, I will allow you to use it.

text_raw: Yet your ability to wield the "Power" tells a different tale...
text_clean: Yet your ability to wield the "Power" tells a different tale...

text_raw: If you're talking about a fight with {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Myordin#Myurdin}...
text_clean: If you're talking about a fight with {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Myordin#Myurdin}...

text_raw: The darkness over the peak will be lifted...
text_clean: The darkness over the peak will be lifted...

text_raw: But the shadows will not dissipate.
text_clean: But the shadows will not dissipate.

text_raw: Don't dwell too much on fate.
text_clean: Don't dwell too much on fate.

text_raw: As every day brings with it new change.
text_clean: As every day brings with it new change.

text_raw: Oh, and one last thing.
text_clean: Oh, and one last thing.

text_raw: This power... it's not complete yet.
text_clean: This power... it's not complete yet.

text_raw: If you seek its full potential, head to the Scorched Mountain.
text_clean: If you seek its full potential, head to the Scorched Mountain.

text_raw: Well then...
text_clean: Well then...

text_raw: May the ancestors' blessings be with you.
text_clean: May the ancestors' blessings be with you.

text_raw: I'm no one special.
text_clean: I'm no one special.

text_raw: If so, that night would have gone much different...
text_clean: If so, that night would have gone much different...

text_raw: This power... It'll help us?
text_clean: This power... It'll help us?

text_raw: Shadows?
text_clean: Shadows?

text_raw: I'll keep that in mind.
text_clean: I'll keep that in mind.

text_raw: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}!
text_clean: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}!

text_raw: The witch told me
text_clean: The witch told me

text_raw: you'd be needing my help.
text_clean: you'd be needing my help.

text_raw: She's waiting for us.
text_clean: She's waiting for us.

text_raw: Just over there,
text_clean: Just over there,

text_raw: at the Crimson Lake.
text_clean: at the Crimson Lake.

text_raw: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}.
text_clean: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}.

text_raw: Finished talking with {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Tolstein#Torstein}.
text_clean: Finished talking with {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Tolstein#Torstein}.

text_raw: It will begin when you return.
text_clean: It will begin when you return.

text_raw: Nearly rejoined the ancestors.
text_clean: Nearly rejoined the ancestors.

text_raw: Wish she'd shared that with me.
text_clean: Wish she'd shared that with me.

text_raw: I'll be back soon.
text_clean: I'll be back soon.

text_raw: Come to your senses!
text_clean: Come to your senses!

text_raw: Did you just take a knock to the head?
text_clean: Did you just take a knock to the head?

text_raw: Here, how many fingers am I holding up?
text_clean: Here, how many fingers am I holding up?

text_raw: What's bloody wrong with you pair?
text_clean: What's bloody wrong with you pair?

text_raw: Did you sneak off for a drink without me again?
text_clean: Did you sneak off for a drink without me again?

text_raw: That's enough of your rubbish! Pull yourselves together!
text_clean: That's enough of your rubbish! Pull yourselves together!

text_raw: Blackberry... Blackberry...
text_clean: Blackberry... Blackberry...

text_raw: Lightning... A bolt of lightning...
text_clean: Lightning... A bolt of lightning...

text_raw: We were picking blackberries. Where are we now?
text_clean: We were picking blackberries. Where are we now?

text_raw: Aye, aye, lightning from the sky!
text_clean: Aye, aye, lightning from the sky!

text_raw: The Deepest Darkness commands.
text_clean: The Deepest Darkness commands.

text_raw: The shadows walk with me.
text_clean: The shadows walk with me.

text_raw: All things unfold by the will of {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Umbra_Boss#Umbra}.
text_clean: All things unfold by the will of {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Umbra_Boss#Umbra}.

text_raw: I am Ator, Archon and faithful servant of His dark will.
text_clean: I am Ator, Archon and faithful servant of His dark will.

text_raw: Defier of darkness...
text_clean: Defier of darkness...

text_raw: Do you have the strength to face what slumbers within? Ah...
text_clean: Do you have the strength to face what slumbers within? Ah...

text_raw: Ruin upon those who have scorned the dark!
text_clean: Ruin upon those who have scorned the dark!

text_raw: Praise be... to the Deepest Darkness...
text_clean: Praise be... to the Deepest Darkness...

text_raw: Darkness devours all!
text_clean: Darkness devours all!

text_raw: Foolish one... darkness is the origin of all things.
text_clean: Foolish one... darkness is the origin of all things.

text_raw: Darkness alone is truth!
text_clean: Darkness alone is truth!

text_raw: The void beckons you by name.
text_clean: The void beckons you by name.

text_raw: The hour of judgment is at hand... Darkness shall determine your fate!
text_clean: The hour of judgment is at hand... Darkness shall determine your fate!

text_raw: Coward. Do not look back.
text_clean: Coward. Do not look back.

text_raw: I will hear no excuses.
text_clean: I will hear no excuses.

text_raw: Come forth, defiler of darkness!
text_clean: Come forth, defiler of darkness!

text_raw: Your arrogance pierces the sky!
text_clean: Your arrogance pierces the sky!

text_raw: O Deepest Darkness... Engulf this wretch...
text_clean: O Deepest Darkness... Engulf this wretch...

text_raw: Have mercy, I beg you.
text_clean: Have mercy, I beg you.

text_raw: Only a moment more...
text_clean: Only a moment more...

text_raw: This time, the task will be done without fail.
text_clean: This time, the task will be done without fail.

text_raw: We never sought to disturb your will...
text_clean: We never sought to disturb your will...

text_raw: Before the might of darkness, all life is insignificant!
text_clean: Before the might of darkness, all life is insignificant!

text_raw: Know your place!
text_clean: Know your place!

text_raw: I am a faithful servant of darkness.
text_clean: I am a faithful servant of darkness.

text_raw: I will never fall to the likes of you.
text_clean: I will never fall to the likes of you.

text_raw: Darkness, lend me your strength!
text_clean: Darkness, lend me your strength!

text_raw: Return to the void's embrace.
text_clean: Return to the void's embrace.

text_raw: The shadowed path lies where sandstorms howl.
text_clean: The shadowed path lies where sandstorms howl.

text_raw: Glory to the Great Void!
text_clean: Glory to the Great Void!

text_raw: Who dares disrupt these sacred rites?
text_clean: Who dares disrupt these sacred rites?

text_raw: Protrate yourself before the Deepest Darkness!
text_clean: Protrate yourself before the Deepest Darkness!

text_raw: O Deepest Darkness, your servant calls...!
text_clean: O Deepest Darkness, your servant calls...!

text_raw: Return to the void's embrace.
text_clean: Return to the void's embrace.

text_raw: Seek the far ridge where the storm-lord never sleeps.
text_clean: Seek the far ridge where the storm-lord never sleeps.

text_raw: Those who defy the Great Void, be condemned!
text_clean: Those who defy the Great Void, be condemned!

text_raw: Only ruin awaits those who defy the Darkness!
text_clean: Only ruin awaits those who defy the Darkness!

text_raw: Oh, Darkness, look upon your servant with favor...
text_clean: Oh, Darkness, look upon your servant with favor...

text_raw: Your heart is forfeit.
text_clean: Your heart is forfeit.

text_raw: By the will of Darkness, I judge you!
text_clean: By the will of Darkness, I judge you!

text_raw: Behold the beauty of Darkness!
text_clean: Behold the beauty of Darkness!

text_raw: Your life shall be offered to the Deepest Darkness!!
text_clean: Your life shall be offered to the Deepest Darkness!!

text_raw: Feel the cutting edge of the void!
text_clean: Feel the cutting edge of the void!

text_raw: Return to the void's embrace.
text_clean: Return to the void's embrace.

text_raw: The way ends where the frozen lake lies in sight.
text_clean: The way ends where the frozen lake lies in sight.
